subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Quds 7
subcodes.first_line: This is the Tablet of holiness; upon it hath been written, by a Pen sacred and wondrous, the verses of God, the King, the Transcendent, the Almighty
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح القدس قد رقم فیه من قلم قدس بدیع آیات الله الملک المتعالی العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @chastisement and requital, @high station of the true believer, @personal instructions
